structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-08-01 New Non-QM Investor: Arc Home LLC
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-08-01 11:00:55-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Interest in Non-QM loan products has grown rapidly. With that, Capital Markets is excited to add another player to our Non-QM product range:  Arc Home LLC <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/ElDoq9cjnU1En55SFzIimswBQyCNW-HztfM7HCO17agLSA?e=8x7qpX> . Arc offers a similar product offering to our current Non-QM investors, but with parameters that accommodate an expanded variety of scenarios, and with competitive pricing.              

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Non-QM

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EudfywAeJH9ClLGeeVRHqqEBzOR8Tmpd4DbuONRmOR8H0Q?e=xfajN5> 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EgtPWwC5nYlOj778FQBFbcIBqdOMgon43K0XlWGm3ynqXg?e=tZbBy7>      

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Non-QM

	*	1-year Full doc, Bank Statement, CPA P&L, 1099, Asset Utilization and Asset Qualifier 
	*	Up to $3.0 MM, 90% LTV, 660+ FICO
	*	“Clean Slate” permits 1x30 housing history OR derogatory credit 

*	DSCR

	*	Up to $3M, up to 80% LTV, down to 0.75 DSCR ratio, 640+ FICO 
	*	Rural properties permitted
	*	Foreign Nationals permitted (up to $1.5MM, 70% LTV)

*	Other highlights: 

	*	LLCs permitted: terms and conditions apply
	*	Forward facing Scenario <https://externalapps.ahl100.com:8443/Auth/LendingQb2/Login?ReturnUrl=%2FDealDesks%2FScenarioRequest>  and Income Analysis <https://externalapps.ahl100.com:8443/Auth/LendingQb2/Login?ReturnUrl=%2FDealDesks%2FIncomeAnalysisRequest>  support (register using the links)
